channel.title: Crossed Paths by UTMB
channel.itunes:author: UTMB
channel.itunes:summary:
Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ Three easy ways to support us ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬   

1. Subscribe to the podcast 🔔

2. Rate it on Apple Podcasts, Spotify or Podcast Addict ⭐

3. Follow @utmbworldseries on social media 🤳🏼


This podcast is produced in partnership with SportCast Studios

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Vincent Bouillard & Jean Sulpice
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Vincent Bouillard & Jean Sulpice
item.itunes:subtitle: UTMB 2024, technical innovations and constant drive for excellence
item.description:
Today, the winner of the 2024 UTMB, Vincent Bouillard, meets Michelin 2-Star Chef Jean Sulpice at his restaurant on the shores of the Annecy Lake. Together they talk about this historic race, technical innovations in trail running and their constant drive for excellence.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment when their paths crossed.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ Three easy ways to support us ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬   

1. Subscribe to the podcast 🔔

2. Rate it on Apple Podcasts, Spotify or Podcast Addict ⭐

3. Follow @utmbworldseries on social media 🤳🏼


This podcast is produced in partnership with SportCast Studios

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Vincent Bouillard & Jean Sulpice
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Vincent Bouillard & Jean Sulpice
item.itunes:subtitle: UTMB 2024, innovations techniques et quête d'excellence
item.description:
Aujourd’hui, le vainqueur de l’UTMB 2024, Vincent Bouillard, rencontre le Chef étoilé Jean Sulpice dans son restaurant au bord du lac d’Annecy. Ensemble ils évoquent cette course mémorable, les innovations techniques dans le trail et leur perpétuelle quête d’excellence.

Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths est un podcast UTMB World Series.


Chaque mois, deux coureurs, un élite et un amateur se rencontrent pour échanger autour du trail et de ce qu’il représente à leurs yeux.

Dans leurs conversations, ils dévoilent également ce qui les motivent dans la vie et comment ils l’expriment sur les sentiers.

Ils partageront leurs passions et inspirations et apprendront à mieux se connaître pendant ce temps d’échange… et nous aussi !


Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


En savoir plus sur https://utmb.world/ ou https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ Trois manières de soutenir le podcast ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬   

1. Abonnez vous sur votre app de podcast 🔔

2. Laissez nous 5 étoiles et un commentaire sur Apple Podcasts, Spotify ou Podcast Addict ⭐

3. Suivez nous @utmbworldseries sur les réseaux sociaux 🤳🏼


Ce podcast est produit en partenariat avec SportCast Studios

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: [UTMB] Caitlin Fielder & Karen Tumini
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Caitlin Fielder & Karen Tumini
item.itunes:subtitle: 50K races, injuries, and relationship between female racers
item.description:
Today, New Zealand elite runner Caitlin Fielder, winner of the 50K at Tarawera Ultra Trail by UTMB 2024, Fifth at the last OCC, meets Karen Tumini, a passionate italian runner. Together, they talk about 50K races, living with a top level athlete, dealing with injuries, and relationship between female racers.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment where their paths crossed.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Ida-Sophie Hegemann & Florent Neyron
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Ida-Sophie Hegemann & Florent Neyron
item.itunes:subtitle: Training, injuries and superstitions
item.description:
Today, German elite runner Ida-Sophie Hegemann, winner of the 100K at Nice Côte d’Azur by UTMB 2022, 2nd and 3rd at Istria 100 by UTMB, meets Florent Neyron, a passionate french runner from Annecy. Together, they talk about leaving her country for a better training, dealing with injuries, and superstitions before a race.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment where their paths crossed.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Lucy Bartholomew & Paul Spackman
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Lucy Bartholomew & Paul Spackman
item.itunes:subtitle: Being a professional runner, long distance races and vegan nutrition
item.description:
Today, Australian elite runner Lucy Bartholomew, a two-time tenth at the UTMB and multiple podium finisher at the Ultra Trail Australia by UTMB, meets Paul Spackman, a passionate English runner and mountain climbing addict. Together they talk about being a professional runner, long distance races and vegan nutrition. We hope you’ll enjoy this moment when their paths crossed.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment when their paths crossed.

item.title: [UTMB] Ruth Croft & Camille Olianti
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Ruth Croft & Camille Olianti
item.itunes:subtitle: Music, running and meditation
item.description:
Today, New Zealand elite runner Ruth Croft, double winner of the OCC in 2018 and 2019, winner of the CCC in 2015 and the Western States in 2022, meets Camille Olianti, a passionate french runner and DJ. On a pedal boat, in the middle of Annecy’s Lake, they talk about how they came to trail running, and share about discipline and mental preparation.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment where their paths crossed.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.

We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths.

item.title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Ludovic Pommeret & Lydie Raillard
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Ludovic Pommeret & Lydie Raillard
item.itunes:subtitle: Love of travel, nutrition, and the secret to longevity
item.description:
Today, French trail legend Ludovic Pommeret, winner of the UTMB in 2016 and the TDS in 2022, welcomes Lydie Raillard, a passionate runner from Chamonix, to his home. Together, they discuss their love of travel, nutrition, and the secret to longevity in sports.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment where their paths crossed.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Ludovic Pommeret & Lydie Raillard
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Ludovic Pommeret & Lydie Raillard
item.itunes:subtitle: Voyages, nutrition et longévité
item.description:
Aujourd’hui, la légende du trail français Ludovic Pommeret, vainqueur de l’UTMB 2016 et de la TDS en 2022, reçoit chez lui Lydie Raillard, une coureuse passionnée de Chamonix. Ensemble, ils évoquent leur goût du voyage, la nutrition et le secret de la longévité dans le sport.

Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths est un podcast UTMB World Series.


Chaque mois, deux coureurs, un élite et un amateur se rencontrent pour échanger autour du trail et de ce qu’il représente à leurs yeux.

Dans leurs conversations, ils dévoilent également ce qui les motivent dans la vie et comment ils l’expriment sur les sentiers.

Ils partageront leurs passions et inspirations et apprendront à mieux se connaître pendant ce temps d’échange… et nous aussi !


Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


En savoir plus sur https://utmb.world/ ou https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ Trois manières de soutenir le podcast ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬   

1. Abonnez vous sur votre app de podcast 🔔

2. Laissez nous 5 étoiles et un commentaire sur Apple Podcasts, Spotify ou Podcast Addict ⭐

3. Suivez nous @utmbworldseries sur les réseaux sociaux 🤳🏼


Ce podcast est produit en partenariat avec SportCast Studios

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: [UTMB] Dakota Jones & Luca Quattrone
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Dakota Jones & Luca Quattrone
item.itunes:subtitle: Preserving nature, sewing and sport data
item.description:
Today, North American elite runner Dakota Jones, 3rd at UTMB Mont Blanc 2023 and winner of Transvulcania by UTMB 2023, chats with Luca Quattrone, a passionate Italian runner from Verona. Together they talk about their love of running in the great outdoors and commitment to preserving nature, they also share about their passions like sewing and sport data.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment where their paths crossed.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths.

item.title: [UTMB] Dakota Jones & Luca Quattrone (sneak preview)
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Dakota Jones & Luca Quattrone (sneak preview)
item.description:
A new episode is coming soon: north American runner Dakota Jones, 3rd at CCC in 2023, chats with Luca Quattrone, a passionate Italian runner from Verona. Here's a sneak peek while you wait for the full episode to be released.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Emily Hawgood & Kasia Bledkowska
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Emily Hawgood & Kasia Bledkowska
item.itunes:subtitle: Solidarity, night races and bursts of laughter
item.description:
Today, Zimbabwean elite runner Emily Hawgood, recent winner of the 73 km race at Chianti Ultra Trail by UTMB meets Kasia Bledkowska, a passionate Polish runner. Together they talk about how trail running came into their lives, the solidarity and inclusive spirit of the runner community and share great bursts of laughter as they get to know each other.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment where their paths crossed.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Pau Capell & Laya Viñas
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Pau Capell & Laya Viñas
item.itunes:subtitle: Passion, personal life and homemade electronic music
item.description:
Today, Spanish elite runner Pau Capell, winner of the UTMB 2019 and four-time winner of the Transgrancanaria, meets Laya Viñas, a young Peruvian runner based in Paris. Together they talk about the essence of their passion for trail running, the balance of their lifestyle and homemade electronic music.

We hope you’ll enjoy this moment where their paths crossed.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.

They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Jonas Russi & Roy van Son
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Jonas Russi & Roy van Son
item.itunes:subtitle: Running, injuries and rock'n'roll
item.description:
Today, elite Swiss runner Jonas Russi, winner of the Tor des Géants 2022 and the Lavaredo Ultra-Trail by UTMB 2023, chats with Roy van Son, a passionate Dutch runner based in Zurich. Together, they talk about the place running has in their lives, injuries and what it’s taught them, as well as their passions, including rock’n'roll.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros
item.description:
To kick off this second season, Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz, second in the 2021 UTMB, and winner of the Diagonale des Fous and the Hardrock 100 last year, welcomes Fanny Daros to his home. Together, they discuss their victories, their failures, their physical and mental preparation, their love for travel and discovery, not forgetting the enjoyment of good food!


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ Three easy ways to support us ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬   

1. Subscribe to the podcast 🔔

item.title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros
item.description:
Pour inaugurer cette deuxième saison, Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz, deuxième de l’UTMB 2021, et vainqueur de la Diagonale des fous et de la Hardrock 100 l’année dernière, accueille chez lui Fanny Daros. Ensemble, ils évoquent leurs victoires, leurs échecs, leur préparation physique et mentale, leur goût du voyage et de la découverte, sans négliger les plaisirs de la table !


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths est un podcast UTMB World Series.


Chaque mois, deux coureurs, un élite et un amateur se rencontrent pour échanger autour du trail et de ce qu’il représente à leurs yeux.

Dans leurs conversations, ils dévoilent également ce qui les motivent dans la vie et comment ils l’expriment sur les sentiers.

Ils partageront leurs passions et inspirations et apprendront à mieux se connaître pendant ce temps d’échange… et nous aussi !


Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


En savoir plus sur https://utmb.world/ ou https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ Trois manières de soutenir le podcast ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬   

1. Abonnez vous sur votre app de podcast 🔔

2. Laissez nous 5 étoiles et un commentaire sur Apple Podcasts, Spotify ou Podcast Addict ⭐

3. Suivez nous @utmbworldseries sur les réseaux sociaux 🤳🏼


Ce podcast est produit en partenariat avec SportCast Studios

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros (sneak preview)
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros (sneak preview)
item.description:
The first episode of the new season is around the corner: Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz, second in the 2021 UTMB, will meet Fanny Daros, a passionate runner. Here's a sneak peek while you wait for the episode to be released.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros (extrait)
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz & Fanny Daros (extrait)
item.description:
Le premier épisode de la nouvelle saison arrive très bientôt : Aurélien Dunand-Pallaz, deuxième de l’UTMB 2021, y rencontrera Fanny Daros, une coureuse passionnée.

En voici un extrait en attendant la sortie de l’épisode.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths est un podcast UTMB World Series.


Chaque mois, deux coureurs, un élite et un amateur se rencontrent pour échanger autour du trail et de ce qu’il représente à leurs yeux.

Dans leurs conversations, ils dévoilent également ce qui les motivent dans la vie et comment ils l’expriment sur les sentiers.

Ils partageront leurs passions et inspirations et apprendront à mieux se connaître pendant ce temps d’échange… et nous aussi !


Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


En savoir plus sur https://utmb.world/ ou https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ Trois manières de soutenir le podcast ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬   

1. Abonnez vous sur votre app de podcast 🔔

2. Laissez nous 5 étoiles et un commentaire sur Apple Podcasts, Spotify ou Podcast Addict ⭐

3. Suivez nous @utmbworldseries sur les réseaux sociaux 🤳🏼

item.title: [UTMB] Marianne Hogan & Yvan Cognasse
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Marianne Hogan & Yvan Cognasse
item.itunes:subtitle: Work-life balance, inspiration and good coffee
item.description:
In this ninth episode, Canadian runner Marianna Hogan meets Yvan Cognasse, a French runner who is passionate about performance.

They spoke about keeping their running and work life separate, how to inspire others and the importance of good coffee.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Adam Peterman & Louisa Moreau
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Adam Peterman & Louisa Moreau
item.itunes:subtitle: Van life, injuries and running with dogs
item.description:
In this episode, Adam Peterman, the rising American star of trail running, meets Louisa Moreau,

a local runner from Chamonix who spoke about van life, how they have dealt with injuries and running with their dogs."

item.title: [UTMB] Dani Moreno & Benjamin Raffort
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Dani Moreno & Benjamin Raffort
item.itunes:subtitle: Burnout, mountains and thrills
item.description:
In this seventh episode, Dani Moreno, the American runner who switched tracks for trails around the world,

meets Benjamin Raffort, a former ski jumper who found a new connection to the mountains through running.


Just before the 2023 Dacia UTMB Mont-Blanc week,

they spoke about how sport has changed their life for better and worse, how they changed their mindset around it and, of course, about how running is faster than walking.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Martina Valmassoi & Charlotte Durieux
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Martina Valmassoi & Charlotte Durieux
item.itunes:subtitle: Training, running and other sports, learning how to play the guitar
item.description:
In this sixth episode, Martina Valmassoi, the Italian runner and photographer who won the TDS 2022,

meets Charlotte Durieux, a French runner who's trying to make running a part of her ever-changing life!


They spoke about their training, how to balance different sports and learning how to play the guitar."

item.title: [UTMB] Kilian Jornet & Julien Loisy
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Kilian Jornet & Julien Loisy
item.itunes:subtitle: Danger, responsibilities and Stephen King
item.description:
In this fifth episode we welcome the 4 times winner of UTMB, a runner who need no introduction : Kilian Jornet.

Kilian is joined by Julien Loisy, a French banker who learned to balance his passion for running, biking and his work.


They spoke about the beauty and dangers of the mountains, the responsibility of being admired and of course Stephen King's novels.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Thibaut Garrivier & Elia Collignon
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Thibaut Garrivier & Elia Collignon
item.itunes:subtitle: Life balance, nutrition and concerto
item.description:
In this fourth episode, we are welcomed into the home of French elite trail runner and doctor, Thibaut Garrivier, winner of the CCC in 2021. He is joined by Elia Collignon, a runner for whom trail running has been transformative at different stages of her life. 


They speak about how to perform in different aspects of life, the importance of shame-free nutrition in trail running and the magic of a concerto. 

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Thibaut Garrivier & Elia Collignon
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Thibaut Garrivier & Elia Collignon
item.itunes:subtitle: Equilibre de vie, alimentation et concerto
item.description:
Pour ce quatrième épisode, Thibaut Garrivier, le célèbre traileur/docteur et vainqueur de la CCC en 2021, nous accueille chez lui.

Il échange avec Elia Collignon, une coureuse et passionnée d’outdoor pour qui le trail a transformé sa vie.


Ils échangent sur le fait d’être performant dans les différents aspects de la vie, de l'importance d'une alimentation décomplexée dans la pratique du trail et de la magie d'un concerto.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths est un podcast UTMB World Series.


Chaque mois, deux coureurs, un élite et un amateur se rencontrent pour échanger autour du trail et de ce qu’il représente à leurs yeux.

Dans leurs conversations, ils dévoilent également ce qui les motivent dans la vie et comment ils l’expriment sur les sentiers.

Ils partageront leurs passions et inspirations et apprendront à mieux se connaître pendant ce temps d’échange… et nous aussi !


Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


En savoir plus sur https://utmb.world/ ou https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Manon Bohard & Manon Baudoz
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇬🇧 Manon Bohard & Manon Baudoz
item.itunes:subtitle: Mountains, Judo and Risotto
item.description:
In this third episode, we welcome the French trail runner Manon Bohard, who just finished third at Innsbruck’s World Mountain and Trail Running Championships.

She also won the TDS 2021 and is the daughter of the famous trail runner Patrick Bohard.


She met another Manon, from the Jura mountains, also passionate about trail running: Manon Baudoz, who finished her first UTMB in 2022.

They both discussed the meaning of their passion for trail running, their various experiences on the races, the beauty of the mountains, judo, family and of course the recipe for the perfect risotto.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Manon Bohard & Manon Baudoz
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] 🇫🇷 Manon Bohard & Manon Baudoz
item.itunes:subtitle: Des montagnes, du judo et un risotto
item.description:
Dans ce troisième épisode, nous accueillons la traileuse française Manon Bohard, médaille de bronze en individuel et médaille d’or par équipe aux derniers Championnats du monde de Trail Long. Fille du renommé traileur Patrick Bohard, Manon a notamment gagné la TDS en 2021.


Manon rencontre aujourd’hui… une autre Manon, également jurassienne et passionnée de trail : Manon Baudoz. 


Les deux Manon ont échangé autour du sens profond de leur pratique, de leurs fortunes diverses sur les courses, de la beauté de la montagne, de judo, de famille et bien évidemment de la recette du risotto parfait.



▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths est un podcast UTMB World Series.


Chaque mois, deux coureurs, un élite et un amateur se rencontrent pour échanger autour du trail et de ce qu’il représente à leurs yeux.

Dans leurs conversations, ils dévoilent également ce qui les motivent dans la vie et comment ils l’expriment sur les sentiers.

Ils partageront leurs passions et inspirations et apprendront à mieux se connaître pendant ce temps d’échange… et nous aussi !


Nous espérons que vous apprécierez ce moment où leurs chemins se sont croisés.


En savoir plus sur https://utmb.world/ ou https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Fernanda Maciel & Caroline Egan
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Fernanda Maciel & Caroline Egan
item.itunes:subtitle: Running around the world, spirituality and chocolate
item.description:
In this second episode, we welcome Brazilian ultra runner, Fernanda Maciel, who has finished in the top-five at UTMB Mont-Blanc numerous times.

Fernanda is joined by Caroline Egan, a freelance photographer from California living in Annecy, France.

The two dynamic outdoor lovers share how their families brought them to trail running and also somehow to France, where they both now live.

 

They spoke about the energy that sport gives them as women, what it feels like to push boundaries, and how food and making good chocolate can change your life!


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries

item.title: [UTMB] Petter Engdahl & Doud Cousty
item.itunes:title: [UTMB] Petter Engdahl & Doud Cousty
item.itunes:subtitle: Families, a twisted ankle and Bruce Springsteen
item.description:
In this first episode we welcome top Swedish elite runner Petter Engdahl.

In 2022, Petter won the 100km CCC® race at UTMB® Mont-Blanc in less than 10 hours, and Transvulancia by UTMB®.

He also has an impressive UTMB Index of 921.

Petter is joined by Doud Cousty, a French outdoor enthusiast and father of two, and the pair met in Geneva right after a skimo race that they both took part in. 


They spoke about their inspirations, how to balance work and their passion for the mountains, the love for their families, a twisted ankle and of course Bruce Springsteen.


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬      


Crossed Paths is a UTMB World Series podcast.


Each month two athletes, one elite and one amateur, meet and discuss what trail running means to them.

In this conversation, they’ll also reveal what drives them in life, and how they express it on the hills.


They share their common passions, interests, beliefs and get to know each other along the way. And so will we.


We hope you’ll enjoy this privileged moment where… they crossed paths. 


You can find out more about UTMB World series on https://utmb.world/ or https://linktr.ee/utmbworldseries
